fact_nuggets.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokemon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl 1.2 Generation IX Effect [ edit | edit source ] Decorate raises the target's Attack and Special Attack stats by two stages each. Unlike most moves, it bypasses moves like Protect , Detect , and even Max Guard to affect the target but is blocked by Crafty Shield . It cannot affect a target that has a substitute or in the semi-invulnerable turn of a move. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokemon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] Decorate cannot be selected in a battle. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] In Versions 1.0 to 2.0.2 of Pokemon Scarlet and Violet , Decorate could not be selected in a battle. Starting with Version 3.0.0, it is usable and functions the same as it did in the previous generation.
